summary: Current dist build still applies the unconditional isFileStale gate in structural-indexer.js and scan.js still calls indexFiles(config) without options; packet 012 excludes are present in dist.
Schema migration code only adds columns/tables/indexes and updates schema_version; no migration path drops graph rows. The row-removal path is scan cleanup using stale-only results.
replaceNodes transaction failures are per-file and caught after non-incremental cleanup already ran, so duplicate-symbol errors did not abort cleanup mid-flight.
Root .gitignore explicitly unignores .opencode and nested skill .gitignore files exclude build/cache outputs, not the whole skill tree.
After the patch, run a real incremental:false scan and verify >=1000 files, zero duplicate-symbol errors, stable repeat scan, and coherent metadata/nodes/edges for the three formerly failing files.
Defer discovered candidate count fields such as candidateFilesDiscovered or postExcludeCandidateFiles to packet 014 unless operator confusion persists.
Defer method_signature mapping and deeper parser identity repair to a parser-completeness packet; the current remediation should stay a minimal P0 crash guard.
